creator: risner@stdio.com
text:
So I installed an EFI system in Jan. It had 60 drive bays. It has worked fine with just the boot drives. Once I installed 56 more drives, it freezes. I've fixed the system by switching back to bios boot.

/etc/hostid size=0x25
Start @ Oxffffffff8037c000
EF1 framebuffer information:
addr size  0xc6000000, 0x300000
dimensions 1024 × 768
stride     1024
masks      0x00ff0000, 0x0000ff00, 0x000000ff, 0xff000000
